name: Consuelo's Albondigas
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive oil or enough to sauté the balls
1/4 cup White wine or Dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix egg, bread crumbs, celery, salt, pepper, and half of the garlic in a bowl.
2. Form the mixture into small balls.
3. Roll the balls in flour and brown them in hot oil. Remove to a plate as they turn golden brown.
4. In the same oil, sauté the remaining garlic and parsley until fragrant.
5. Deglaze with 2 tablespoons white wine or water.
6. Add all ingredients to a pot and simmer for 30-45 minutes. Carrots and/or potatoes can be added with the meatballs.
7. Serve with broth as soup or without broth as the main dish.
